headline: Korny YeastLoaf Changes Name to 'Yeast (But With a Silent Q and a Lampshade)'
summary: Legal clerk: 'This is not a fraternity hazing form.'
fullBody: He now demands everyone address him as Yeast!!q. Kip Cardboard files restraining order involving a very confused llama. The llama has since been adopted by Tailor SlowFlick.
